---
title: "Home"
pagetitle: "Duc Thai Tran"
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero__text">
    <p class="hero__eyebrow">Advertising researcher · Documentary photographer · Piano player</p>
    <h1 class="hero__title">Duc&nbsp;Thai<br>Tran<em>.</em></h1>
    <p class="hero__sub">Researcher and practitioner in creativity: advertising, photography, music.</p>
    <span class="hero__cue">About me</span>
  </div>
  <div class="hero__media">
    <img src="images/portrait.jpg" alt="Portrait of Duc Thai Tran">
  </div>
</section>

<section class="block" id="about">
  <p class="block__lead">An in-progress polymath — documentary and street photographer, piano player, and advertising researcher.</p>
  <p>I study advertising strategy and effectiveness, storytelling, and brand identity. My research focuses on the creative journey in producing ads, how stories are developed, and how to maintain brand identity's clarity throughout the whole process.</p>
  <p style="margin-top:2rem;">
    <a class="more" href="research.qmd">See the research →</a>
    &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
    <a class="more" href="personal.qmd">See personal works →</a>
  </p>
</section>

<footer class="site-foot">
  <span>Duc Thai Tran — Sydney</span>
  <span><a href="mailto:ducthai.tran@outlook.com">ducthai.tran@outlook.com</a></span>
  <span>© 2026</span>
</footer>
```
